abilities.effect: The scrambled words align into the originally written script. Identifying the parchment reveals that it can be activated with a command, but a critical success to Identify Magic is needed to learn the command word.
abilities.name: Activate

abilities.effect: You light the parchment on fire, burning the words off while leaving the parchment unharmed and ready to bear more text.
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: This finely crafted, seemingly mundane parchment is useful for writing sensitive documents. When words are written on this parchment, they instantly scramble into unrecognizable script, requiring a DC 20 check to Decipher Writing.

traits.name: Illusion
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait involve false sensory stimuli.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

variants.name: Codebreaker's Parchment (Greater)
variants.text: The DC to Decipher Writing is 30 and requires master proficiency.

variants.name: Codebreaker's Parchment (Major)
variants.text: The DC to Decipher Writing is 40 and requires legendary proficiency.
